sentence: Sonnelvision makes cringema. Watch it anyway.

wombos.definition: Cinematic content that is deeply, specifically cringe — but so cinematic about it that you can't look away. The cringe version of a peanemis. 'Can't wait to drop their next cringema.'
Tunnel vision but son-coded — a state of hyper-focused intensity directed through a son-energy lens, blocking out everything else.
wombos.example: Once he locked in, it was pure sonnelvision — nothing else existed.
